mapper.select:
select * from gb_department_goods_stock_reduce
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from gb_department_goods_stock_reduce

select *, ndfgGrant.gb_distributer_father_goods_id 'ndfgGrant_gb_distributer_father_goods_id', ndfgGrant.gb_dfg_fathers_father_id 'ndfgGrant_gb_dfg_fathers_father_id', ndfgGrant.gb_dfg_father_goods_name 'ndfgGrant_gb_dfg_father_goods_name', ndfgGrant.gb_dfg_father_goods_color 'ndfgGrant_gb_dfg_father_goods_color', ndfgGrant.gb_dfg_father_goods_level 'ndfgGrant_gb_dfg_father_goods_level' from gb_department_goods_stock_reduce as gdgsr left join gb_distributer_father_goods as f on f.gb_distributer_father_goods_id = gdgsr.gb_dgsr_gb_dis_goods_father_id left join gb_distributer_father_goods as ndfgGrant on f.gb_dfg_fathers_father_id = ndfgGrant.gb_distributer_father_goods_id
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_department_goods_stock_reduce where gb_department_goods_stock_reduce_id in
#{gbDepartmentGoodsStockReduceId}
